original_question:
Given the curve $\begin{cases} x=2\cos \theta \\ y=\sin \theta \end{cases}$, where $\theta\in[0,2\pi)$, the minimum distance from a point $P(x,y)$ on the curve to a fixed point $M(a,0)$, $(a > 0)$, is $\dfrac {3}{4}$. Find the value of $a$.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
